module.name: renovaxpayments
module.description: Multi-platform payment gateway: Crypto (USDT, USDC, EURC, DAI on multiple chains), Stripe (cards), PayPal and more — single hosted checkout.
module.author: RENOVAX
module.confirmUninstall: Uninstall RENOVAX Payments? Configuration will be removed; the events table is preserved unless you tick "purge data".
